name: RSS Feed Discovery
description: Discover RSS and Atom feed URLs by probing common paths (/feed, /rss, /atom.xml, /blog/feed, etc.) and parsing homepage HTML for <link rel="alternate"> feed references. Returns feed URLs with type (RSS/Atom), title, and item count.
usage_notes: Discovers RSS/Atom feed URLs, not page content. Useful for news-focused entities. Results feed into later steps as URLs.

options.name: max_feeds
options.label: Maximum feeds per site
options.description: Limit how many feed URLs to return per website.

options.name: check_common_paths
options.label: Check common feed paths
options.description: Try /feed, /rss, /atom.xml and other common feed locations.
